title: Stray Dog and Lightning Bolt
html: Stub. Yahir's dual self-image from 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure: "You are the stray dog walking the street and you are also a lightning bolt sent by god to set things ablaze." Crystallizes the high/low paradox he carries — humble drifter and divinely-charged disruptor at once. Resonates with magnetic aura and soul as beacon.
